item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
A couple nagging details that prevent an upvote:

When one of the conditions are met, SCP-4268 will attempt to locate the tenant.

What if the second or third condition happens but there's no tenant? In this situation, does SCP-4268 prioritize stealing money from whoever's closest to its house, or itself?

but it has been recorded at least once trying to choke one sleeping subject by attempting to insert its head into their mouths.

Is this a typo or does the person have more than one mouth? Asking because the author has a very particular writing style and I just want to know if it's intentional.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: hey i love this and this deserves more attention :D

item.title: Junior Staff Post
item.content:encoded:
Currently, you have not sourced the image used in this article, and as such may be a violation of the SCP wiki's license (CC-BY-SA 3.0). You have 48 hours to source the image used. If you have not sourced the image within the allotted time frame, or the source is noncompliant with the SCP wiki's license, then we'll have to take the image down.

EDIT: The image has been sourced and is cc-compliant. All is well. Welcome back, Famine.
